source_rationale: RGS5 is a pericyte/mural cell marker highly expressed in DDX4 AB+ cells, indicating a perivascular identity
TAGLN (transgelin) is a smooth muscle marker indicating contractile perivascular cell identity
ACTA2 (alpha smooth muscle actin) is a canonical marker of smooth muscle/pericyte lineage cells
NOTCH3 is a key signaling receptor characteristic of pericytes and vascular mural cells
PDGFRB is a canonical pericyte marker essential for pericyte recruitment and signaling
MCAM (CD146) is a cell adhesion molecule expressed on pericytes and perivascular cells
MYH11 is a smooth muscle myosin heavy chain marking contractile mural cells
Phospholamban is expressed in smooth muscle cells regulating calcium handling
IGFBP7 is highly expressed in pericytes and perivascular cells in the ovary
Decorin is a proteoglycan abundantly expressed in ovarian stromal/fibroblast cells
PDGFRA is a canonical marker of mesenchymal stromal/fibroblast cells in the ovary
COL1A1 encodes type I collagen, a hallmark of fibroblast/stromal cell extracellular matrix production
SERPINE2 is a serine protease inhibitor enriched in ovarian stromal cells
FOXL2 is a key transcription factor in ovarian somatic cell differentiation
STAR (steroidogenic acute regulatory protein) is essential for steroidogenesis in ovarian somatic cells
ARX is a transcription factor expressed in ovarian stromal progenitor cells
TCF21 is a transcription factor marking ovarian stromal/theca cell progenitors
CLDN11 is a tight junction protein enriched in ovarian stromal cells
Midkine is a growth factor highly expressed in ovarian stromal cells
Von Willebrand factor is a canonical endothelial cell marker involved in hemostasis
Claudin-5 is a tight junction protein specific to endothelial cells
VE-cadherin (CDH5) is a canonical endothelial-specific adherens junction protein
KDR (VEGFR2) is the primary VEGF receptor and a definitive endothelial marker
CD34 is a sialomucin expressed on vascular endothelial cells
ERG is an ETS transcription factor essential for endothelial cell identity
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific secreted factor important for vascular development
Endomucin is a sialomucin specifically expressed on endothelial cells
FLT1 (VEGFR1) is a VEGF receptor specifically expressed on endothelial cells
ICAM2 is constitutively expressed on endothelial cells and used as an endothelial marker
SOX17 is a transcription factor critical for arterial endothelial cell specification
Anti-Müllerian hormone is a canonical marker of granulosa cells in growing follicles
FOXL2 is a master transcription factor for granulosa cell identity and differentiation
Inhibin alpha is produced by granulosa cells and is a key marker of this lineage
Follistatin is secreted by granulosa cells and regulates activin signaling in folliculogenesis
AMH receptor type 2 is specifically expressed on granulosa cells mediating AMH signaling
HSD17B1 is a steroidogenic enzyme expressed in granulosa cells for estrogen biosynthesis
TNNI3 is highly upregulated in granulosa cells and serves as a distinguishing marker
Prostaglandin D2 synthase is highly expressed in granulosa cells of the ovary
Keratin 18 is an epithelial marker expressed in granulosa cells reflecting their epithelial nature
WFDC2 (HE4) is highly expressed in granulosa cells and is a known ovarian marker
WNT6 is a Wnt ligand expressed in granulosa cells involved in follicle signaling
WT1 is a transcription factor expressed in granulosa cells important for ovarian development
PTPRC (CD45) is the pan-leukocyte marker expressed on all immune cells
CD69 is an early activation marker on immune cells including T cells and NK cells
TYROBP (DAP12) is an adaptor protein expressed in myeloid and NK cells
CXCR4 is a chemokine receptor broadly expressed on immune cells for homing and migration
AIF1 (IBA1) is a marker of myeloid/macrophage lineage immune cells
CD52 is a glycoprotein expressed on lymphocytes and monocytes, a pan-immune marker
FCER1G is an Fc receptor gamma chain expressed on myeloid and NK immune cells
Lysozyme is a canonical marker of myeloid immune cells including monocytes and macrophages
NKG7 is expressed in NK cells and cytotoxic T cells marking cytotoxic immune populations
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine produced by T cells and NK cells
C1QA is a complement component highly expressed in tissue-resident macrophages
CD14 is the canonical monocyte/macrophage marker and LPS co-receptor
CD163 is a scavenger receptor specific to monocytes and tissue macrophages
CSF1R (CD115) is the M-CSF receptor essential for monocyte/macrophage differentiation
C1QA is a complement component highly expressed in tissue-resident macrophages
C1QB is a complement subunit marking tissue-resident monocyte-derived macrophages
Lysozyme is a canonical myeloid marker highly expressed in monocytes and macrophages
FCGR2A (CD32) is an Fc gamma receptor expressed on monocytes for immune complex binding
FOLR2 is a folate receptor marking tissue-resident macrophages
LYVE1 marks tissue-resident macrophages associated with lymphatic vessels
MS4A6A is a membrane-spanning protein enriched in monocytes and macrophages
Cathepsin S is a cysteine protease highly expressed in monocytes for antigen processing
Stabilin-1 is a scavenger receptor expressed on tissue macrophages
MAFB is a transcription factor driving monocyte/macrophage differentiation
ZP3 encodes zona pellucida glycoprotein 3, a definitive oocyte-specific marker
FIGLA is an oocyte-specific transcription factor essential for folliculogenesis
DDX4 (VASA) is a canonical germ cell/oocyte marker RNA helicase
DAZL is an RNA-binding protein essential for germ cell development and oocyte maturation
SYCP3 is a synaptonemal complex protein marking meiotic germ cells/oocytes
NLRP5 is a maternal-effect gene specifically expressed in oocytes
DPPA3 (STELLA) is a germ cell-specific gene essential for oocyte development
LHX8 is a transcription factor required for oocyte survival and follicle development
SOHLH2 is a germ cell-specific transcription factor essential for oogenesis
ZAR1 is an oocyte-specific RNA-binding protein critical for early embryogenesis
STAG3 is a meiosis-specific cohesin subunit essential for oocyte chromosome segregation
KPNA7 is an oocyte-specific importin alpha required for nuclear transport in oocytes
FOXR1 is a forkhead transcription factor specifically expressed in oocytes
RGS5 is the top canonical pericyte marker regulating G-protein signaling in mural cells
Transgelin is a smooth muscle/pericyte cytoskeletal protein marking perivascular cells
Alpha smooth muscle actin is a canonical marker of pericytes and vascular smooth muscle cells
PDGFRB is the definitive pericyte receptor essential for pericyte recruitment to vessels
NOTCH3 is a receptor critical for pericyte/vascular smooth muscle cell identity
MYH11 is a smooth muscle myosin heavy chain specific to contractile perivascular cells
MCAM (CD146) is a pericyte surface marker used for perivascular cell identification
Phospholamban is expressed in smooth muscle/pericyte cells regulating calcium signaling
MYL9 is a myosin light chain expressed in smooth muscle and pericyte cells
GJA4 (connexin 37) is a gap junction protein expressed in perivascular mural cells
Decorin is a hallmark extracellular matrix proteoglycan of stromal fibroblasts
PDGFRA is a canonical fibroblast/stromal cell receptor marking mesenchymal populations
Type I collagen alpha-1 is a defining product of stromal fibroblasts
Type I collagen alpha-2 chain is abundantly produced by stromal fibroblasts
TCF21 is a transcription factor marking ovarian stromal/theca progenitor cells
FOXL2 is expressed in ovarian stromal cells and is critical for ovarian somatic cell fate
Lumican is a proteoglycan characteristic of stromal fibroblasts
Osteoglycin is a small leucine-rich proteoglycan enriched in ovarian stromal cells
STAR is essential for steroidogenesis in ovarian theca/stromal cells
CXCL12 (SDF-1) is a chemokine produced by stromal cells to support niche signaling
Fibronectin is a major extracellular matrix component produced by stromal fibroblasts
MMP2 is a matrix metalloproteinase secreted by stromal cells for ECM remodeling
CD3D is a component of the T cell receptor complex and a definitive T cell marker
CD3E is a canonical T cell receptor signaling component specific to T cells
CD3G is part of the TCR complex confirming T cell identity
CD8A marks cytotoxic T lymphocytes and is a canonical T cell subset marker
CD69 is an early T cell activation marker highly expressed in tissue-resident T cells
Granzyme K is expressed by effector memory T cells and marks cytotoxic T populations
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine highly produced by activated T cells
IL7R (CD127) is a key receptor for T cell survival and homeostasis
PTPRC (CD45) is expressed on all T cells and is essential for TCR signaling
LCK is a Src family kinase essential for T cell receptor signaling
RUNX3 is a transcription factor critical for CD8+ T cell differentiation
BCL11B is a transcription factor essential for T cell lineage commitment
Granzyme A is a serine protease marking cytotoxic T cells and NK cells
ITK is a tyrosine kinase specific to T cells required for TCR signaling
